headline: NanoImaging Services Appoints Fraser McLeod as Chief Executive Officer  to Lead Next Phase of Growth
summary: Fraser McLeod CEO, NanoImaging Services San Diego, CA, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NanoImaging Services (NIS), a leading provider of integrated gene-to-structure and cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) services for structure-based drug discovery, is pleased to announce the appointment of Fraser McLeod as Chief Executive Officer. Mr. McLeod brings more than 20 years of global leadership experience in the life sciences industry, with a strong background in software, automation, and integrate
